required_preferences.fact: Permanently suspends morning neighborhood walks due to advanced knee osteoarthritis — substitutes seated exercises and upper-body stretches as daily routine

supersedes.fact: Temporarily skips morning walks due to wrist fracture — substitutes gentle indoor stretching instead

required_preferences.fact: Adheres to a variable medication schedule based on new dosing instructions; consults pillbox reminders and alerts for each dose instead of a fixed morning routine

supersedes.fact: Takes medication for arthritis at the same time each morning — never forgets or varies the routine

required_preferences.fact: Plans to visit Seattle for extended stays twice a year, coordinating travel with his wife's schedule to maximize time with his grandson
Answers buyer messages within 12 hours, even on weekends — never lets correspondence lapse overnight
Invites a neighbor or old colleague for coffee on occasional evenings when his wife is out, to add social connection to his week
Prioritizes attending library auction preview days and sales over estate sales when rare book inventory is available

persona: A retired teacher supplementing income by reselling vintage books online
